title: Cosmic Expedition
description: A space modpack, with a few optimization mods.
body:
This is a space modpack, with optimisation and general mods.
Including:
Ad Astra and it's addons,
Waystones,
Xaero's minimap,
those mods' dependencies,
and some quality of life mods such as: Sodium, Iris, Modernfix, Memory Leak Fix and Zoomify.
(Also including Fabric API, but... That's kinda obvious.)
